author.bio: A peer-to-peer hypermedia protocol to make the web faster, safer, and more open.
author.name: IPFS

content.text: Discover an InterPlanetary Web at the first IPFS Camp in Barcelona on June 27-30. Join us for three action-packed days of workshops, hacking and deep dives. Learn more and apply to attend at https://camp.ipfs.io/register #IPFS #libp2p #DWeb
